body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
replaces #385 (this PR rebased on main)
closes #384

We need to test out our Float32 compatibility in the experiments (which act as integration tests).

### To do
- [x] for each exp, loop over (FT, t_end) - run Float32 only for a couple steps, Float64 for entire simulation
at end of sim, check final type for both, make plots for Float64

### QA
- This increases CI time slightly, but only by 1 minute max per run (and typically more like 20 seconds)
title: float32 in experiments [replacement PR]
